overall.description: Third-person horror game footage following a schoolgirl in a Japanese sailor uniform exploring a dark, atmospheric traditional wooden building. The character navigates through dimly lit hallways, descends staircases, and explores rooms illuminated by candlelight and eerie blue lighting, creating a tense, ominous atmosphere typical of Japanese horror games.

segments.scene_description: The character descends to the bottom of the stairwell, passes a bulletin board mounted on the wall, and proceeds along a corridor where warm candlelight becomes visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small derelict room dominated by an eerie blue hanging light, revealing blood stains scattered across the wooden floor and broken furniture, then quickly turns to exit back into the corridor.

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a corridor decorated with hanging chains and red symbolic markings, eventually entering a storage room filled with wooden shelves, cardboard boxes, and illuminated by warm candlelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a traditional Japanese building that shifts from dimly lit hallways into a claustrophobic, ritualistic basement. It begins with the character walking through a wooden corridor with shoji doors before descending a staircase toward a lower level. As the character reaches the bottom and passes a wall-mounted bulletin board, the environment transitions into a dark, narrow corridor where warm candlelight flickers against wooden lattice screens and hanging chains. The scene then opens into a derelict room dominated by an eerie blue light and blood-stained floors, before the camera quickly retreats back into the hallway past red symbolic markings. Finally, the movement leads into a storage room filled with cardboard boxes and wooden shelves, illuminated by the soft glow of candlelight.
